root_cause: Proposal features reach the decoder, but repair remains optional and is overpowered by conservative non-regression. The next route needs explicit per-part edit budgets and connected-output constraints in proposal-supported weak regions.
next_route: V208 edit-budget constrained proposal decoder with per-part quotas, connected-component output loss, semantic part separation, and hard-control firewall.
